description_long: This is a classic wooden barrel with a slightly bulging cylindrical shape, constructed from vertical wooden staves bound together by three prominent metal hoops. The wood has a natural, medium-brown finish with visible grain patterns, giving it a rustic and aged appearance. The metal bands are dark gray, slightly weathered, and encircle the barrel at the top, middle, and bottom, providing structural reinforcement. The top surface is flat and appears to be sealed, indicating the presence of a fitted wooden lid. There are no visible handles, spigots, or markings on the exterior. The overall design suggests it is intended for storage or transport of liquids or dry goods in urban or industrial settings.
description: A medium-brown wooden barrel with three dark metal hoops and a flat, sealed top, featuring a rustic, weathered appearance.
description_view_0: The barrel is seen from the front, showing the full curvature of the staves and all three metal hoops clearly.
description_view_1: This view highlights the right side of the barrel, with the wood grain and metal bands still prominent and no additional features visible.
description_view_2: The left side of the barrel is visible, maintaining the same banding and wood texture as other views.
description_view_3: The rear view of the barrel, similar to the front, with the same arrangement of metal hoops and wood grain.
